description_long: This is a modern, upholstered lounge chair with a deep teal fabric covering and a contoured, butterfly-shaped backrest that provides ergonomic support. The seat is wide and slightly reclined, designed for comfort and relaxation, with a smooth, seamless appearance and no visible seams or tufting. The chair stands on four slender, outward-angled black legs, likely made of metal, which give it a stable yet lightweight look. The absence of armrests and the gentle curve of the backrest suggest a minimalist, contemporary style suitable for urban environments. The fabric appears soft and matte, contrasting with the hard, sleek finish of the legs. This chair would fit well in public waiting areas, lobbies, or modern parks.
description: A modern teal lounge chair with a contoured backrest, wide seat, and four black metal legs, featuring a minimalist, upholstered design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved backrest and seat, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reclined seat angle and the depth of the backrest, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the butterfly-shaped backrest and the outward splay of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chair's profile and the gentle curve of the backrest.
